summary: Unsloth is a platform that enables users to run and train various AI models locally, providing tools for both inference and training with optimized performance. It aims to simplify the process of model deployment and fine-tuning for developers and researchers across different operating systems.
use_cases: Training a custom language model for a chatbot
Running a local image classification model for a specific dataset
Fine-tuning a text-to-speech model for personalized voice synthesis
